title: 10 best herbal tinctures for menopause
description: Stinging nettle tinctures helps with menopause because it offers a natural and holistic approach to alleviating symptoms. The plant's bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and saponins, have been shown to help regulate hormone balance and reduce hot flashes and night sweats. Additionally, stinging nettle has anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe the body and mind during this transitional phase of life.
